mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0401_02-01#Sql001 */ TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(ADD_MONTHS(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, - S.MONTHS)), 'YYYY"年"MM"月"' ) AS CODE_NAME, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(ADD_MONTHS(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, - S.MONTHS)), 'YYYYMM' ) AS CODE_ID FROM ( SELECT rownum - 1 AS MONTHS FROM all_catalog WHERE rownum < 61 ) S

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0401_02-01#Sql002 */ TO_CHAR(A.COR_CONFIRMATION_DATE, 'yyyy"年"mm"月"dd"日"') AS LAST_UPDATE_TIME FROM ( SELECT * FROM COR_SELF_CHECK WHERE COR_BROKER_CODE = #{req.brokerCode} ORDER BY COR_CONFIRMATION_DATE DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0401_02-01#Sql003 */ COR_CONFIRMATION_DATE AS CONFIRMATION_DATE FROM COR_SELF_CHECK WHERE COR_ENFORCE_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMM') AND COR_BROKER_CODE = #{req.brokerCode}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0401_02-01#Sql004 */ A.COR_SORT_NO AS SORT_NO, A.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID AS SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID, A.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_NAME AS SELF_ASSESSMENT_ITEM_NAME, A.REASON_REQUIRED_FLG AS REASON_REQUIRED_FLAG, A.ANSWER FROM COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM A
, COR_SELF_CHECK_BROKER_ANS B
WHERE A.COR_ENFORCE_DATE = #{req.assignMonth}
AND B.BROKER_CODE = #{req.brokerCode} AND A.BROKER_DIVISION = B.BROKER_DIVISION
AND A.COR_INDICATION_FLG = '1' ORDER BY A.BROKER_DIVISION ASC, A.COR_SORT_NO ASC

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0401_02-01#Sql005 */ A.COR_SORT_NO AS SORT_NO, A.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID AS SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID, A.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_NAME AS SELF_ASSESSMENT_ITEM_NAME, C.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG AS CONFIRMATION, A.ANSWER, A.REASON_REQUIRED_FLG AS REASON_REQUIRED_FLAG, C.COR_ANSWER_REASON AS ANSWER_REASON, C.COR_ANSWER_COUNT AS ANSWER_COUNT, C.COR_ANSWER_RESULT AS ANSWER_RESULT FROM COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM A, COR_SELF_CHECK B, COR_SELF_CHECK_CONFIRMATION C WHERE B.COR_ENFORCE_DATE = #{req.assignMonth} AND B.COR_BROKER_CODE = #{req.brokerCode} AND A.COR_INDICATION_FLG = '1' AND B.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID = C.COR_SELF_CHECK_ID AND C.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID = A.COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM_ID ORDER BY A.BROKER_DIVISION ASC, A.COR_SORT_NO ASC
